nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: 📥 IN: { provider_id: number (>0), service_id?: number, title: string (min 5), content: string (min 10), source_type: rag_source_type, status?: string, language?: string, metadata?: object, summary?: string }

parameters.jsonExample: { "provider_id": 1, "title": "Ejemplo de documento", "content": "Contenido de ejemplo para RAG", "source_type": "faq", "status": "published", "language": "es" }

parameters.jsCode:
const msg = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Input validation failed';
return [{ json: { error_code: 'VALIDATION_ERROR', error_message: msg } }];

const msg = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Failed to generate embedding';
return [{ json: { error_code: 'EMBEDDING_ERROR', error_message: msg } }];

const msg = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Failed to insert document';
return [{ json: { error_code: 'DATABASE_ERROR', error_message: msg } }];

const msg = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Insert returned no valid id';
return [{ json: { error_code: 'INSERT_ERROR', error_message: msg } }];

const msg = $input.first()?.json?.message || 'Failed to archive superseded documents';
return [{ json: { error_code: 'ARCHIVE_ERROR', error_message: msg } }];
